allow: Bash(pytest -q tests/test_aeg_smoke.py -k "manifest_shuffle or build_fingerprint or contrastive_batch_size_one or zero_training_batches or load_checkpoint_round_trips or validate_aeg_pt_reports_build_fingerprints")

PowerShell($py = Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $python = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($py\) { & $py.Source -m pytest -q tests/test_aeg_smoke.py -k "manifest_shuffle or build_fingerprint or contrastive_batch_size_one or zero_training_batches or load_checkpoint_round_trips or validate_aeg_pt_reports_build_fingerprints" } elseif \($python\) { & $python.Source -m pytest -q tests/test_aeg_smoke.py -k "manifest_shuffle or build_fingerprint or contrastive_batch_size_one or zero_training_batches or validate_aeg_pt_reports_build_fingerprints" } else { Write-Error "Neither py nor python launcher is available" })
Bash(python -m pytest tests/test_aeg_smoke.py -k "metadata or load_aeg_payload or load_checkpoint or build_fingerprint or manifest_shuffle or run_rejects")
